_doc: Wave-5 deterministic graph overlay on the PORTABLE best (w2-ctx-header: headers ON, rerank OFF). Query-time only: same index_key as w2-ctx-header, so both arms share one collection (no re-index noise). Seeds = top-10 fused files; import/pair/test/link/mention neighbors get a lambda-scaled boost; unseen strong neighbors are fetched via doc_id-filtered hybrid search. No LLM, CPU-only, portable-eligible.
